arts.ttl: Ten Hag admits Man Utd summer signings have already FAILED
arts.sum: Ten Hag, 54, played a key role in the arrivals of De Ligt, Ugarte and Zirkzee this summer, yet his decision to bench all three players vs Aston Villa suggests he hasn’t been impressed by their performances so far this campaign. Ten Hag admits Man Utd summer signings have already FAILED

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher brutally dismisses Erik ten Hag's claim on Man Utd team changes
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag's decision to bench Matthijs de Ligt and Lisandro Martinez for Sunday's match against against Aston Villa has been questioned by fans and pundits

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher absolutely blown away by 'outstanding' Man United player vs Aston Villa
Rio Ferdinand delivers one-word verdict on huge Erik ten Hag Manchester United decision
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is firmly under the spotlight at Man United after a disappointing start to the Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville's exact same damning Man Utd verdict 12 months on speaks volumes
arts.sum: Twelve months on from his alarming assessment of Manchester United, Gary Neville has once again taken aim at his old club for the same issue to suggest nothing has changed

arts.ttl: Aston Villa suffer big injury blow in Man United clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa centre-back Ezri Konsa came off injured in the Premier League clash against Manchester United. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Steve Holland stance on Manchester United role amid long-standing Gareth Southgate link
arts.sum: Steve Holland is reportedly looking to land his first job as a manager - even if Gareth Southgate is appointed by Man United in the future.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to rival Manchester United for England midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool have joined Manchester United in the race to sign Adam Wharton from Crystal Palace. Arne Slot failed to sign a deep-lying midfielder during the summer window with the Reds having been frustrated in a bid to sign Martin Zubimendi. arts.ttl: Ten Hag kicked 'special player' out of Man Utd
arts.sum: Former Man Utd first-team coach Benni McCarthy, who worked with Sancho at the club from 2022 to 2024, says that Ten Hag have sold a special player. Erik ten Hag kicked out a "special player" when he sold Jadon Sancho to Chelsea, according to Benni McCarthy.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville gives damning assessment of Erik ten Hag's Man Utd selection for Aston Villa trip
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has made some big decisions with his starting XI for a crunch Premier League clash away to Aston Villa and Gary Neville has given his verdict
